repos.name: kaansen
repos.title: Kaansen — Whole-Home Audio Distribution
repos.description: Custom PCB audio distribution system with ESP32/STM32, DSP matrix mixing.
repos.notes: Multiple custom PCBs, Mermaid arch diagrams in README. Rich enough for 2-3 posts.

repos.name: kunjctl
repos.title: Kunjctl — Home Automation via Thread + Matter
repos.description: ESP32-based home automation using Thread networking and Matter protocol.
repos.notes: Thread + Matter is cutting-edge IoT. Multiple firmware targets, nanopb protobuf messaging.

repos.name: kanopy
repos.title: Kanopy — Telescope Rain Canopy Automation
repos.description: Arduino-based automated rain protection canopy for a telescope.
repos.notes: Ties astrophotography hobby with embedded systems. Clean HAL abstraction layer.

repos.name: kotton
repos.title: Kotton — Fiber/Coroutine Scheduler
repos.description: User-space fiber scheduler with hand-written x86 assembly for context switching.
repos.notes: Hand-rolled x86 assembly (32-bit and 64-bit), custom stack management. Timeless systems topic.

repos.name: kash
repos.title: Kash — Trading Bot
repos.description: Automated trading bot with Rust backend (Axum + GraphQL + SeaORM) and React frontend.
repos.notes: Full-stack DDD architecture. Potentially sensitive — user should review what to share.

repos.name: hifi
repos.title: Hifi — Audio Processing in Zig
repos.description: Audio signal processing with I/O grid and processor pipeline in Zig.
repos.notes: Niche intersection of Zig and audio. Single-day burst of work but interesting approach.

repos.name: astro
repos.title: Astro/Rastro — Telescope Control Software
repos.description: INDI client for telescope control in TypeScript and Rust.
repos.notes: Two repos forming one logical project. Rastro (Rust) default branch is master. Multi-language evolution story.

repos.name: arduino-wine-cooler
repos.title: Arduino Wine Cooler
repos.description: Peltier-based wine cooler with predictive temperature control via Arduino.
repos.notes: Charming weekend project. Predictive cooling approach is a nice touch.
